phrases.cultural_note: In Swiss transport hubs, major ticket counters like SBB are typically centrally located and clearly signed with 'SBB' or 'Billettschalter'. Staff expect concise location requests.

likely_response.translation_en: On the main floor to the right.

responses.english: On the main floor to the right.

phrases.cultural_note: Swiss stations use clear signage for rooftop access. Staff expect sign-following as a safe default when micro-location is unknown.

likely_response.local: Die Dachterrasse ist oben über die Aufzüge erreichbar.
likely_response.translation_en: The rooftop terrace is accessible upstairs via the elevators.

responses.english: The rooftop terrace is accessible upstairs via the elevators.
responses.local: Die Dachterrasse ist oben über die Aufzüge erreichbar.

phrases.cultural_note: Platform closures are dynamic and depend on train schedules. Staff defer to real-time display or counter for precise info.

phrases.intent_en: Where do I buy BLS regional pass
phrases.cultural_note: BLS regional passes are sold at dedicated BLS counters or designated desks marked 'BLS'. Staff expect clear intent-based routing.

likely_response.translation_en: Ask at the BLS ticket counter.

responses.english: Ask at the BLS ticket counter.
